### Phase 14.5: Detail Screen Components

**File: `src/components/detail/CodeCard.tsx`**

```typescript
import { memo, useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  Pressable,
  StyleSheet,
  Alert,
  Clipboard,
} from 'react-native';
import type { PrimaryCodeView } from '@/types/bathroom';
import { VoteButtons } from './VoteButtons';

interface CodeCardProps {
  code:      PrimaryCodeView;
  codeId:    string | null;
  userVote:  -1 | 1 | null;
  onVote:    (codeId: string, vote: 1 | -1) => void;
  isVoting:  boolean;
  onSubmitCode: () => void;
}

export const CodeCard = memo(function CodeCard({
  code,
  codeId,
  userVote,
  onVote,
  isVoting,
  onSubmitCode,
}: CodeCardProps) {
  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);

  const handleCopy = useCallback(() => {
    if (!code.code_value) return;
    Clipboard.setString(code.code_value);
    setCopied(true);
    setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000);
  }, [code.code_value]);

  // No code exists
  if (code.visibility === 'hidden') {
    return (
      <View style={styles.noCodeContainer}>
        <Text style={styles.noCodeIcon}>🔓</Text>
        <Text style={styles.noCodeTitle}>No Code Available</Text>
        <Text style={styles.noCodeSubtitle}>
          Know the code? Help the community by submitting it.
        </Text>
        <Pressable
          style={styles.submitButton}
          onPress={onSubmitCode}
          accessibilityLabel="Submit access code"
          accessibilityRole="button"
        >
          <Text style={styles.submitButtonText}>Submit Code</Text>
        </Pressable>
      </View>
    );
  }

  const confidenceColor =
    (code.confidence_score ?? 0) >= 80 ? '#16a34a' :
    (code.confidence_score ?? 0) >= 50 ? '#d97706' : '#dc2626';

  return (
    <View style={styles.container}>
      {/* Code Display */}
      <View style={styles.codeRow}>
        <Pressable
          style={({ pressed }) => [
            styles.codeValueContainer,
            pressed && styles.codeValuePressed,
            code.is_expired && styles.codeValueExpired,
          ]}
          onPress={handleCopy}
          accessibilityLabel={`Access code: ${code.code_value}. Tap to copy.`}
          accessibilityRole="button"
          accessibilityHint="Copies code to clipboard"
        >
          <Text style={[styles.codeValue, code.is_expired && styles.expiredText]}>
            {code.code_value}
          </Text>
          <Text style={styles.copyIcon}>{copied ? '✓' : '⎘'}</Text>
        </Pressable>
      </View>

      {copied && (
        <Text style={styles.copiedConfirm} accessibilityLiveRegion="polite">
          Copied to clipboard
        </Text>
      )}

      {code.is_expired && (
        <Text style={styles.expiredWarning}>⚠️ This code may be expired</Text>
      )}

      {/* Confidence + Verification */}
      <View style={styles.metaRow}>
        <View style={[styles.confidenceBadge, { backgroundColor: confidenceColor + '22' }]}>
          <Text style={[styles.confidenceText, { color: confidenceColor }]}>
            {code.confidence_label}
          </Text>
        </View>
        {code.last_verified_label && (
          <Text style={styles.verifiedAt}>
            Verified {code.last_verified_label}
          </Text>
        )}
      </View>

      {/* Vote Buttons */}
      {codeId && (
        <VoteButtons
          codeId={codeId}
          upVotes={code.up_votes}
          downVotes={code.down_votes}
          userVote={userVote}
          onVote={onVote}
          isLoading={isVoting}
        />
      )}

      {/* Submit different code */}
      <Pressable
        style={styles.submitDifferentButton}
        onPress={onSubmitCode}
        accessibilityLabel="Submit a different code"
        accessibilityRole="button"
      >
        <Text style={styles.submitDifferentText}>Submit updated code</Text>
      </Pressable>
    </View>
  );
});

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
    borderRadius:    12,
    padding:         16,
    borderWidth:     1,
    borderColor:     '#e5e7eb',
    marginHorizontal: 16,
    marginVertical:   8,
  },
  noCodeContainer: {
    backgroundColor: '#f9fafb',
    borderRadius:    12,
    padding:         24,
    marginHorizontal: 16,
    marginVertical:   8,
    alignItems:      'center',
    borderWidth:     1,
    borderColor:     '#e5e7eb',
    borderStyle:     'dashed',
  },
  noCodeIcon:     { fontSize: 36, marginBottom: 8 },
  noCodeTitle:    { fontSize: 17, fontWeight: '600', color: '#111827', marginBottom: 4 },
  noCodeSubtitle: { fontSize: 14, color: '#6b7280', textAlign: 'center', marginBottom: 16 },
  submitButton: {
    backgroundColor: '#2563eb',
    borderRadius:    8,
    paddingHorizontal: 20,
    paddingVertical:   10,
  },
  submitButtonText:   { color: '#ffffff', fontWeight: '600', fontSize: 15 },
  codeRow:            { flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', marginBottom: 8 },
  codeValueContainer: {
    flex:           1,
    flexDirection:  'row',
    alignItems:     'center',
    justifyContent: 'space-between',
    backgroundColor: '#f3f4f6',
    borderRadius:   8,
    paddingHorizontal: 16,
    paddingVertical: 14,
  },
  codeValuePressed:  { backgroundColor: '#e5e7eb' },
  codeValueExpired:  { backgroundColor: '#fef2f2' },
  codeValue: {
    fontSize:    28,
    fontWeight:  '700',
    color:       '#111827',
    letterSpacing: 4,
    fontVariant: ['tabular-nums'],
  },
  expiredText:    { color: '#9ca3af' },
  copyIcon:       { fontSize: 20, color: '#6b7280' },
  copiedConfirm:  { fontSize: 12, color: '#16a34a', marginBottom: 6, textAlign: 'center' },
  expiredWarning: { fontSize: 12, color: '#d97706', marginBottom: 8 },
  metaRow: {
    flexDirection: 'row',
    alignItems:    'center',
    gap:           8,
    marginBottom:  12,
  },
  confidenceBadge: {
    paddingHorizontal: 10,
    paddingVertical:    4,
    borderRadius:      12,
  },
  confidenceText:         { fontSize: 12, fontWeight: '600' },
  verifiedAt:             { fontSize: 12, color: '#9ca3af' },
  submitDifferentButton:  { marginTop: 10, alignItems: 'center' },
  submitDifferentText:    { fontSize: 13, color: '#2563eb' },
});
```

**File: `src/components/detail/VoteButtons.tsx`**

```typescript
import { memo } from 'react';
import { View, Text, Pressable, StyleSheet, ActivityIndicator } from 'react-native';

interface VoteButtonsProps {
  codeId:    string;
  upVotes:   number;
  downVotes: number;
  userVote:  -1 | 1 | null;
  onVote:    (codeId: string, vote: 1 | -1) => void;
  isLoading: boolean;
}

export const VoteButtons = memo(function VoteButtons({
  codeId,
  upVotes,
  downVotes,
  userVote,
  onVote,
  isLoading,
}: VoteButtonsProps) {
  return (
    <View style={styles.container} accessibilityLabel="Vote on this code">
      <Text style={styles.label}>Is this code still working?</Text>
      <View style={styles.buttons}>
        {/* Upvote */}
        <Pressable
          style={({ pressed }) => [
            styles.button,
            styles.upButton,
            userVote === 1  && styles.upButtonActive,
            pressed         && styles.buttonPressed,
            isLoading       && styles.buttonDisabled,
          ]}
          onPress={() => onVote(codeId, 1)}
          disabled={isLoading}
          accessibilityLabel={`Upvote: ${upVotes} people found this code helpful`}
          accessibilityRole="button"
          accessibilityState={{ selected: userVote === 1, disabled: isLoading }}
        >
          {isLoading && userVote !== -1 ? (
            <ActivityIndicator size="small" color="#16a34a" />
          ) : (
            <>
              <Text style={[styles.voteIcon, userVote === 1 && styles.upIconActive]}>
                👍
              </Text>
              <Text style={[styles.voteCount, userVote === 1 && styles.upCountActive]}>
                {upVotes}
              </Text>
            </>
          )}
        </Pressable>

        {/* Downvote */}
        <Pressable
          style={({ pressed }) => [
            styles.button,
            styles.downButton,
            userVote === -1 && styles.downButtonActive,
            pressed         && styles.buttonPressed,
            isLoading       && styles.buttonDisabled,
          ]}
          onPress={() => onVote(codeId, -1)}
          disabled={isLoading}
          accessibilityLabel={`Downvote: ${downVotes} people found this code not working`}
          accessibilityRole="button"
          accessibilityState={{ selected: userVote === -1, disabled: isLoading }}
        >
          {isLoading && userVote !== 1 ? (
            <ActivityIndicator size="small" color="#dc2626" />
          ) : (
            <>
              <Text style={[styles.voteIcon, userVote === -1 && styles.downIconActive]}>
                👎
              </Text>
              <Text style={[styles.voteCount, userVote === -1 && styles.downCountActive]}>
                {downVotes}
              </Text>
            </>
          )}
        </Pressable>
      </View>
    </View>
  );
});

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: { marginTop: 4 },
  label: { fontSize: 13, color: '#6b7280', marginBottom: 10, textAlign: 'center' },
  buttons: { flexDirection: 'row', gap: 10 },
  button: {
    flex:            1,
    flexDirection:   'row',
    alignItems:      'center',
    justifyContent:  'center',
    borderRadius:    8,
    paddingVertical: 10,
    gap:             6,
    borderWidth:     1,
    borderColor:     '#e5e7eb',
    backgroundColor: '#f9fafb',
  },
  upButton:       {},
  downButton:     {},
  upButtonActive: { backgroundColor: '#dcfce7', borderColor: '#16a34a' },
  downButtonActive: { backgroundColor: '#fee2e2', borderColor: '#dc2626' },
  buttonPressed:  { opacity: 0.7 },
  buttonDisabled: { opacity: 0.5 },
  voteIcon:       { fontSize: 18 },
  upIconActive:   {},
  downIconActive: {},
  voteCount:      { fontSize: 15, fontWeight: '600', color: '#374151' },
  upCountActive:  { color: '#16a34a' },
  downCountActive: { color: '#dc2626' },
});
```

**File: `src/components/detail/CleanlinessRating.tsx`**

```typescript
import { memo, useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import { View, Text, Pressable, StyleSheet, ActivityIndicator } from 'react-native';

interface CleanlinessRatingProps {
  avgCleanliness: number;
  ratingCount:    number;
  userHasRated:   boolean;
  onRate:         (rating: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5) => void;
  isLoading:      boolean;
}

const STAR_LABELS: Record<number, string> = {
  1: 'Very Dirty',
  2: 'Dirty',
  3: 'Okay',
  4: 'Clean',
  5: 'Very Clean',
};

export const CleanlinessRating = memo(function CleanlinessRating({
  avgCleanliness,
  ratingCount,
  userHasRated,
  onRate,
  isLoading,
}: CleanlinessRatingProps) {
  const [hoveredStar, setHoveredStar] = useState<number | null>(null);

  const displayRating = hoveredStar ?? Math.round(avgCleanliness);

  return (
    <View style={styles.container}>
      <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>Cleanliness</Text>

      {/* Average display */}
      {ratingCount > 0 && (
        <View style={styles.averageRow}>
          <Text style={styles.averageNumber}>{avgCleanliness.toFixed(1)}</Text>
          <Text style={styles.averageStar}>★</Text>
          <Text style={styles.ratingCount}>({ratingCount})</Text>
        </View>
      )}

      {/* Star rating input */}
      {!userHasRated && (
        <View style={styles.rateSection}>
          <Text style={styles.ratePrompt}>
            {ratingCount === 0 ? 'Be the first to rate' : 'Rate cleanliness'}
          </Text>
          <View style={styles.stars}>
            {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((star) => (
              <Pressable
                key={star}
                onPress={() => onRate(star as 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5)}
                onPressIn={() => setHoveredStar(star)}
                onPressOut={() => setHoveredStar(null)}
                disabled={isLoading}
                accessibilityLabel={`Rate ${star} star: ${STAR_LABELS[star]}`}
                accessibilityRole="button"
              >
                <Text style={[
                  styles.star,
                  star <= displayRating && styles.starFilled,
                ]}>
                  ★
                </Text>
              </Pressable>
            ))}
          </View>
          {hoveredStar && (
            <Text style={styles.starLabel}>{STAR_LABELS[hoveredStar]}</Text>
          )}
          {isLoading && (
            <ActivityIndicator size="small" color="#2563eb" style={styles.loader} />
          )}
        </View>
      )}

      {userHasRated && (
        <Text style={styles.alreadyRated}>✓ You've rated this bathroom</Text>
      )}
    </View>
  );
});

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container:     { padding: 16, backgroundColor: '#ffffff', borderRadius: 12,
                   marginHorizontal: 16, marginVertical: 4, borderWidth: 1, borderColor: '#e5e7eb' },
  sectionTitle:  { fontSize: 14, fontWeight: '600', color: '#6b7280',
                   textTransform: 'uppercase', letterSpacing: 0.5, marginBottom: 10 },
  averageRow:    { flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'baseline', gap: 4, marginBottom: 12 },
  averageNumber: { fontSize: 28, fontWeight: '700', color: '#111827' },
  averageStar:   { fontSize: 22, color: '#fbbf24' },
  ratingCount:   { fontSize: 13, color: '#9ca3af' },
  rateSection:   { alignItems: 'center', gap: 6 },
  ratePrompt:    { fontSize: 14, color: '#6b7280' },
  stars:         { flexDirection: 'row', gap: 8 },
  star:          { fontSize: 32, color: '#d1d5db' },
  starFilled:    { color: '#fbbf24' },
  starLabel:     { fontSize: 13, color: '#374151', fontWeight: '500' },
  loader:        { marginTop: 4 },
  alreadyRated:  { fontSize: 13, color: '#16a34a', fontWeight: '500', textAlign: 'center' },
});
```

**File: `src/components/detail/PresenceIndicator.tsx`**

```typescript
import { memo } from 'react';
import { View, Text, StyleSheet } from 'react-native';
import type { PresenceSync } from '@/types/realtime';

interface PresenceIndicatorProps {
  presence: PresenceSync | null;
}

export const PresenceIndicator = memo(function PresenceIndicator({
  presence,
}: PresenceIndicatorProps) {
  // Do not render for 0 or 1 viewer (only this user)
  if (!presence || presence.viewer_count <= 1) return null;

  return (
    <View
      style={styles.container}
      accessible
      accessibilityLabel={`${presence.viewer_count} people viewing this bathroom`}
    >
      <View style={styles.dot} />
      <Text style={styles.text}>
        {presence.viewer_count} people viewing
      </Text>
    </View>
  );
});

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    flexDirection:  'row',
    alignItems:     'center',
    gap:             5,
    paddingHorizontal: 10,
    paddingVertical:    4,
    backgroundColor: '#f0fdf4',
    borderRadius:    12,
    alignSelf:       'flex-start',
    marginHorizontal: 16,
    marginBottom:     4,
  },
  dot: {
    width:           6,
    height:          6,
    borderRadius:    3,
    backgroundColor: '#16a34a',
  },
  text: {
    fontSize:   12,
    color:      '#15803d',
    fontWeight: '500',
  },
});
```

### Phase 14.6: Bathroom Detail Screen

**File: `app/bathroom/[id].tsx`**

```typescript
import { useCallback, useMemo } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  ScrollView,
  Pressable,
  StyleSheet,
  Alert,
  Linking,
  ActivityIndicator,
} from 'react-native';
import { SafeAreaView } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';
import { useLocalSearchParams, useRouter } from 'expo-router';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import {
  useBathroomDetail,
  useVoteOnCode,
  useRateCleanliness,
} from '@/hooks/useBathroomDetail';
import { useToggleFavorite } from '@/hooks/useFavorites';
import { useRealtimeCodeVotes } from '@/hooks/useRealtimeCodeVotes';
import { useRealtimePresence } from '@/hooks/useRealtimePresence';
import { useFavoritesStore } from '@/stores/favoritesStore';
import { bathroomDetailKeys } from '@/hooks/useBathroomDetail';
import { CodeCard }            from '@/components/detail/CodeCard';
import { VoteButtons }         from '@/components/detail/VoteButtons';
import { CleanlinessRating }   from '@/components/detail/CleanlinessRating';
import { PresenceIndicator }   from '@/components/detail/PresenceIndicator';
import { RealtimeStatusBadge } from '@/components/realtime/RealtimeStatusBadge';

/**
 * BathroomDetailScreen
 *
 * ROUTING:
 * Expo Router dynamic route: app/bathroom/[id].tsx
 * Accessed via: router.push(`/bathroom/${id}`)
 * Header set in app/_layout.tsx: headerShown=true, title='Bathroom Details'
 *
 * REALTIME WIRING:
 * useRealtimeCodeVotes: updates code confidence and vote counts live
 * useRealtimePresence: shows "N people viewing" indicator
 * Both channels are mounted only for the duration of this screen.
 * useEffect cleanup in each hook guarantees channel teardown on navigation back.
 *
 * VIEWER STATE FRESHNESS:
 * The query key includes userId — auth state changes trigger fresh fetch.
 * Example: user taps favorite while guest → signs in → returns to detail.
 * The viewer_state.is_favorited will now correctly reflect 'true' because:
 * 1. useToggleFavorite set returnIntent
 * 2. Post-auth, returnIntent was replayed (toggle fired)
 * 3. Navigation back → viewer_state in cache has userId key → refetch
 *
 * NAVIGATION TO MODALS:
 * Submit code: router.push('/modal/submit-code?bathroom_id=...')
 * Report: router.push('/modal/report?bathroom_id=...')
 * Both modals return to this screen on completion (Expo Router stack).
 *
 * FAVORITE STATE SOURCE OF TRUTH:
 * We merge two sources for the heart icon:
 * 1. BathroomDetailView.viewer_state.is_favorited (server state at fetch time)
 * 2. useFavoritesStore.isFavorited(id) (optimistic state, persisted)
 * Zustand is the authoritative source for the heart icon.
 * The server state seeds the Zustand cache on first fetch (via useFavoritesList).
 * On this screen, we use Zustand directly to avoid a stale server state showing
 * after a toggle that hasn't yet triggered a list refetch.
 */

export default function BathroomDetailScreen() {
  const { id }  = useLocalSearchParams<{ id: string }>();
  const router  = useRouter();
  const { user } = useAuth();

  // ── Data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const {
    data: detail,
    isLoading,
    isError,
    error,
    refetch,
  } = useBathroomDetail(id);

  // ── Realtime ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  useRealtimeCodeVotes(
    id ?? null,
    bathroomDetailKeys.detail(id, user?.id),
    bathroomDetailKeys.codes(id, user?.id)
  );

  const presence = useRealtimePresence(id ?? null);

  // ── Mutations ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const { mutate: voteOnCode, isPending: isVoting } = useVoteOnCode(id);
  const { mutate: rateCleanliness, isPending: isRating } = useRateCleanliness(id);
  const { mutate: toggleFavorite } = useToggleFavorite();

  // Merge server + optimistic favorite state
  const isFavorited = useFavoritesStore((s) => s.isFavorited(id));
  const isFavPending = useFavoritesStore((s) => s.isPending(id));

  // ── Handlers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  const handleFavoritePress = useCallback(() => {
    toggleFavorite(id);
  }, [id, toggleFavorite]);

  const handleVote = useCallback(
    (codeId: string, vote: 1 | -1) => {
      if (!detail?.primary_code.id) return;
      voteOnCode({
        codeId,
        incomingVote: vote,
        currentVote:  detail.viewer_state.user_vote_on_primary_code,
      });
    },
    [voteOnCode, detail]
  );

  const handleRate = useCallback(
    (rating: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5) => {
      rateCleanliness({ rating });
    },
    [rateCleanliness]
  );

  const handleSubmitCode = useCallback(() => {
    router.push(`/modal/submit-code?bathroom_id=${id}`);
  }, [id, router]);

  const handleReport = useCallback(() => {
    router.push(`/modal/report?bathroom_id=${id}`);
  }, [id, router]);

  const handleDirections = useCallback(() => {
    if (!detail) return;
    const { latitude, longitude } = detail.coordinates;
    const url = `maps://app?daddr=${latitude},${longitude}`;
    const fallback = `https://maps.google.com/?daddr=${latitude},${longitude}`;
    Linking.openURL(url).catch(() => Linking.openURL(fallback));
  }, [detail]);

  // ── Render States ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  if (isLoading) {
    return (
      <SafeAreaView style={styles.center} edges={['bottom']}>
        <ActivityIndicator size="large" color="#2563eb" />
        <Text style={styles.loadingText}>Loading details...</Text>
      </SafeAreaView>
    );
  }

  if (isError || !detail) {
    const isNotFound = error instanceof Error &&
      error.message.startsWith('NOT_FOUND');
    return (
      <SafeAreaView style={styles.center} edges={['bottom']}>
        <Text style={styles.errorIcon}>{isNotFound ? '🚫' : '⚠️'}</Text>
        <Text style={styles.errorTitle}>
          {isNotFound ? 'Bathroom Not Found' : 'Unable to Load'}
        </Text>
        <Text style={styles.errorSubtitle}>
          {isNotFound
            ? 'This bathroom may have been removed.'
            : 'Check your connection and try again.'}
        </Text>
        {!isNotFound && (
          <Pressable style={styles.retryButton} onPress={() => refetch()}>
            <Text style={styles.retryText}>Retry</Text>
          </Pressable>
        )}
      </SafeAreaView>
    );
  }

  return (
    <SafeAreaView style={styles.container} edges={['bottom']}>
      <ScrollView
        style={styles.scroll}
        contentContainerStyle={styles.scrollContent}
        showsVerticalScrollIndicator={false}
      >
        {/* Presence + Connection Status */}
        <View style={styles.statusRow}>
          <PresenceIndicator presence={presence} />
          <RealtimeStatusBadge />
        </View>

        {/* Header: Name + Address + Actions */}
        <View style={styles.header}>
          <View style={styles.headerText}>
            <Text style={styles.placeName}>{detail.place_name}</Text>
            <Text style={styles.address}>{detail.address.formatted}</Text>
          </View>

          {/* Favorite + Directions */}
          <View style={styles.headerActions}>
            <Pressable
              style={styles.actionButton}
              onPress={handleFavoritePress}
              disabled={isFavPending}
              accessibilityLabel={isFavorited ? 'Remove from favorites' : 'Add to favorites'}
              accessibilityRole="button"
            >
              <Text style={[styles.heartIcon, isFavorited && styles.heartActive]}>
                {isFavPending ? '○' : (isFavorited ? '♥' : '♡')}
              </Text>
            </Pressable>

            <Pressable
              style={[styles.actionButton, styles.directionsButton]}
              onPress={handleDirections}
              accessibilityLabel="Get directions to this bathroom"
              accessibilityRole="button"
            >
              <Text style={styles.directionsIcon}>📍</Text>
              <Text style={styles.directionsText}>Directions</Text>
            </Pressable>
          </View>
        </View>

        {/* Feature Flags */}
        <View style={styles.flagsRow}>
          {detail.flags.is_accessible && (
            <View style={[styles.flag, styles.flagAccessible]}>
              <Text style={styles.flagText}>♿ Accessible</Text>
            </View>
          )}
          {detail.flags.is_locked === false && (
            <View style={[styles.flag, styles.flagUnlocked]}>
              <Text style={styles.flagText}>🔓 Unlocked</Text>
            </View>
          )}
          {detail.flags.is_locked === true && (
            <View style={[styles.flag, styles.flagLocked]}>
              <Text style={styles.flagText}>🔐 Requires Code</Text>
            </View>
          )}
          {detail.flags.is_customer_only && (
            <View style={[styles.flag, styles.flagCustomer]}>
              <Text style={styles.flagText}>🛍 Customers Only</Text>
            </View>
          )}
        </View>

        {/* Access Code Card */}
        <CodeCard
          code={detail.primary_code}
          codeId={detail.primary_code.id}
          userVote={detail.viewer_state.user_vote_on_primary_code}
          onVote={handleVote}
          isVoting={isVoting}
          onSubmitCode={handleSubmitCode}
        />

        {/* Cleanliness Rating */}
        <CleanlinessRating
          avgCleanliness={detail.community.avg_cleanliness}
          ratingCount={detail.community.rating_count}
          userHasRated={detail.viewer_state.has_rated_cleanliness}
          onRate={handleRate}
          isLoading={isRating}
        />

        {/* Community Info Row */}
        <View style={styles.communityRow}>
          {detail.community.open_report_count > 0 && (
            <View style={styles.reportWarning}>
              <Text style={styles.reportWarningText}>
                ⚠️ {detail.community.open_report_count} open{' '}
                {detail.community.open_report_count === 1 ? 'report' : 'reports'}
              </Text>
            </View>
          )}
          <Text style={styles.sourceLabel}>
            Source: {detail.source_type} · Updated {new Date(detail.updated_at)
              .toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' })}
          </Text>
        </View>

        {/* Report Button */}
        <Pressable
          style={styles.reportButton}
          onPress={handleReport}
          accessibilityLabel="Report a problem with this bathroom"
          accessibilityRole="button"
        >
          <Text style={styles.reportButtonText}>🚩 Report a Problem</Text>
        </Pressable>
      </ScrollView>
    </SafeAreaView>
  );
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container:     { flex: 1, backgroundColor: '#f9fafb' },
  center:        { flex: 1, alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center', gap: 12, padding: 24 },
  scroll:        { flex: 1 },
  scrollContent: { paddingBottom: 40 },
  loadingText:   { fontSize: 14, color: '#6b7280' },
  errorIcon:     { fontSize: 48 },
  errorTitle:    { fontSize: 20, fontWeight: '600', color: '#111827' },
  errorSubtitle: { fontSize: 14, color: '#6b7280', textAlign: 'center' },
  retryButton:   { backgroundColor: '#2563eb', borderRadius: 8, paddingHorizontal: 20, paddingVertical: 10 },
  retryText:     { color: '#ffffff', fontWeight: '600' },
  statusRow: {
    flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'space-between',
    paddingHorizontal: 16, paddingTop: 12, paddingBottom: 4,
  },
  header: {
    flexDirection: 'row', alignItems: 'flex-start', justifyContent: 'space-between',
    paddingHorizontal: 16, paddingVertical: 12, backgroundColor: '#ffffff',
    borderBottomWidth: 1, borderBottomColor: '#e5e7eb',
  },
  headerText:    { flex: 1, marginRight: 12 },
  placeName:     { fontSize: 22, fontWeight: '700', color: '#111827', marginBottom: 4 },
  address:       { fontSize: 14, color: '#6b7280', lineHeight: 20 },
  headerActions: { flexDirection: 'row', gap: 8, alignItems: 'center' },
  actionButton: {
    padding: 8, borderRadius: 8, backgroundColor: '#f3f4f6',
    alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center',
  },
  heartIcon:   { fontSize: 24, color: '#6b7280' },
  heartActive: { color: '#ef4444' },
  directionsButton: {
    flexDirection: 'row', gap: 4, paddingHorizontal: 12,
    backgroundColor: '#2563eb',
  },
  directionsIcon:  { fontSize: 16 },
  directionsText:  { color: '#ffffff', fontSize: 13, fontWeight: '600' },
  flagsRow:        { flexDirection: 'row', flexWrap: 'wrap', gap: 8,
                     paddingHorizontal: 16, paddingVertical: 10 },
  flag:            { paddingHorizontal: 10, paddingVertical: 5, borderRadius: 20 },
  flagAccessible:  { backgroundColor: '#d1fae5' },
  flagUnlocked:    { backgroundColor: '#fef3c7' },
  flagLocked:      { backgroundColor: '#fee2e2' },
  flagCustomer:    { backgroundColor: '#dbeafe' },
  flagText:        { fontSize: 12, fontWeight: '500', color: '#374151' },
  communityRow:    { paddingHorizontal: 16, paddingVertical: 8, gap: 4 },
  reportWarning:   { backgroundColor: '#fff7ed', borderRadius: 8, paddingHorizontal: 10, paddingVertical: 6,
                     borderWidth: 1, borderColor: '#fed7aa' },
  reportWarningText: { fontSize: 13, color: '#c2410c' },
  sourceLabel:     { fontSize: 11, color: '#9ca3af' },
  reportButton:    { marginHorizontal: 16, marginTop: 8, paddingVertical: 14,
                     alignItems: 'center', borderRadius: 10,
                     borderWidth: 1, borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: '#ffffff' },
  reportButtonText: { fontSize: 14, color: '#6b7280' },
});
```

## Section 15: Community Contribution Modals

### Phase 15.1: Database — Contribution Mutations

**File: `supabase/migrations/009_contribution_mutations.sql`**

```sql
-- ============================================================================
-- Community Contribution Mutations
-- add_bathroom, submit_code, create_report — all SECURITY DEFINER
--
-- ARCHITECTURE:
-- Three community contribution actions are highest-risk for abuse:
-- 1. add_bathroom: Spam / fake locations. Must enforce rate limiting.
-- 2. submit_code: Code spam. Must enforce cooldown per bathroom.
-- 3. create_report: Report flooding. Must enforce per-bathroom per-day limit.
--
-- RATE LIMITS (MVP values — tune post-launch based on abuse patterns):
-- add_bathroom:    5 bathrooms per user per 24 hours
-- submit_code:     1 code per user per bathroom per 7 days
-- create_report:   1 report per user per bathroom (any time — dedup by type)
--
-- DUPLICATE DETECTION for bathrooms:
-- ST_DWithin check: reject if another bathroom already exists within 50 meters.
-- This prevents accidental duplicate submissions from the same device.
-- Business bathrooms may legitimately have two restrooms at the same location
-- (male/female) — they are handled via the 'is_customer_only' flag differentiation.
-- The 50m threshold is conservative; real duplicates are usually within 10m.
-- ============================================================================

-- ============================================================================
-- ADD BATHROOM
-- ============================================================================

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.add_bathroom(
  p_place_name      TEXT,
  p_address_line1   TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  p_city            TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  p_state           TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  p_postal_code     TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  p_country_code    TEXT DEFAULT 'US',
  p_latitude        DOUBLE PRECISION,
  p_longitude       DOUBLE PRECISION,
  p_is_locked       BOOLEAN DEFAULT NULL,
  p_is_accessible   BOOLEAN DEFAULT NULL,
  p_is_customer_only BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  p_initial_code    TEXT DEFAULT NULL
)
RETURNS JSONB
LANGUAGE plpgsql
SECURITY DEFINER
SET search_path = public
AS $$
DECLARE
  v_user_id     UUID;
  v_bathroom_id UUID;
  v_point       GEOGRAPHY;
BEGIN
  v_user_id := auth.uid();
  IF v_user_id IS NULL THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'AUTH_REQUIRED: Must be authenticated to add a bathroom';
  END IF;

  -- Validate required fields
  IF trim(p_place_name) = '' OR length(trim(p_place_name)) < 2 THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'VALIDATION_ERROR: Place name must be at least 2 characters';
  END IF;

  IF p_latitude  < -90  OR p_latitude  > 90  THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'VALIDATION_ERROR: Invalid latitude';
  END IF;
  IF p_longitude < -180 OR p_longitude > 180 THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'VALIDATION_ERROR: Invalid longitude';
  END IF;

  -- Rate limit: max 5 bathrooms per 24h
  IF (
    SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.bathrooms
    WHERE created_by = v_user_id
      AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  ) >= 5 THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'RATE_LIMITED: Maximum 5 bathrooms can be added per day';
  END IF;

  -- Duplicate detection: reject if existing active bathroom within 50m
  v_point := ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(p_longitude, p_latitude), 4326)::geography;

  IF EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM public.bathrooms b
    WHERE b.moderation_status = 'active'
      AND ST_DWithin(b.geom, v_point, 50)  -- 50 meters
  ) THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'DUPLICATE: A bathroom already exists within 50 meters of this location';
  END IF;

  -- Insert bathroom
  INSERT INTO public.bathrooms (
    place_name, address_line1, city, state, postal_code, country_code,
    latitude, longitude, is_locked, is_accessible, is_customer_only,
    source_type, created_by
  )
  VALUES (
    trim(p_place_name), p_address_line1, p_city, p_state, p_postal_code,
    p_country_code, p_latitude, p_longitude, p_is_locked, p_is_accessible,
    p_is_customer_only, 'community', v_user_id
  )
  RETURNING id INTO v_bathroom_id;

  -- Optionally insert initial access code
  IF p_initial_code IS NOT NULL AND length(trim(p_initial_code)) >= 1 THEN
    INSERT INTO public.bathroom_access_codes (
      bathroom_id, submitted_by, code_value, confidence_score
    )
    VALUES (
      v_bathroom_id, v_user_id, trim(p_initial_code),
      50  -- Initial confidence: 50% (new, unverified)
    );
  END IF;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    'bathroom_id', v_bathroom_id,
    'created_at',  NOW()
  );
END;
$$;

-- ============================================================================
-- SUBMIT ACCESS CODE
-- ============================================================================

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.submit_access_code(
  p_bathroom_id UUID,
  p_code_value  TEXT
)
RETURNS JSONB
LANGUAGE plpgsql
SECURITY DEFINER
SET search_path = public
AS $$
DECLARE
  v_user_id UUID;
  v_code_id UUID;
BEGIN
  v_user_id := auth.uid();
  IF v_user_id IS NULL THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'AUTH_REQUIRED: Must be authenticated to submit a code';
  END IF;

  -- Validate code value
  IF trim(p_code_value) = '' THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'VALIDATION_ERROR: Code value cannot be empty';
  END IF;

  IF length(trim(p_code_value)) > 20 THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'VALIDATION_ERROR: Code value cannot exceed 20 characters';
  END IF;

  -- Verify bathroom exists
  IF NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM public.bathrooms
    WHERE id = p_bathroom_id AND moderation_status = 'active'
  ) THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'NOT_FOUND: Bathroom does not exist or has been removed';
  END IF;

  -- Cooldown: 7 days per user per bathroom
  IF EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM public.bathroom_access_codes
    WHERE submitted_by = v_user_id
      AND bathroom_id  = p_bathroom_id
      AND created_at   > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  ) THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'RATE_LIMITED: You have already submitted a code for this bathroom recently';
  END IF;

  -- Mark any existing active codes from this user as superseded
  UPDATE public.bathroom_access_codes
  SET lifecycle_status = 'superseded', updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE submitted_by = v_user_id
    AND bathroom_id  = p_bathroom_id
    AND lifecycle_status = 'active';

  -- Insert new code
  INSERT INTO public.bathroom_access_codes (
    bathroom_id, submitted_by, code_value,
    confidence_score, last_verified_at
  )
  VALUES (
    p_bathroom_id, v_user_id, trim(p_code_value),
    50,   -- Initial confidence
    NOW() -- Submitter verifies on submission
  )
  RETURNING id INTO v_code_id;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    'code_id',    v_code_id,
    'created_at', NOW()
  );
END;
$$;

-- ============================================================================
-- CREATE REPORT
-- ============================================================================

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.create_report(
  p_bathroom_id UUID,
  p_report_type TEXT,
  p_notes       TEXT DEFAULT NULL
)
RETURNS JSONB
LANGUAGE plpgsql
SECURITY DEFINER
SET search_path = public
AS $$
DECLARE
  v_user_id  UUID;
  v_report_id UUID;
  v_valid_types TEXT[] := ARRAY[
    'wrong_code','closed','unsafe','duplicate',
    'incorrect_hours','no_restroom','other'
  ];
BEGIN
  v_user_id := auth.uid();
  IF v_user_id IS NULL THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'AUTH_REQUIRED: Must be authenticated to file a report';
  END IF;

  IF NOT (p_report_type = ANY(v_valid_types)) THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'VALIDATION_ERROR: Invalid report type';
  END IF;

  -- Dedup: one open report per user per bathroom per report_type
  IF EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM public.bathroom_reports
    WHERE reported_by  = v_user_id
      AND bathroom_id  = p_bathroom_id
      AND report_type  = p_report_type
      AND status       IN ('open', 'reviewing')
  ) THEN
    RAISE EXCEPTION 'DUPLICATE: You have already filed this type of report for this bathroom';
  END IF;

  INSERT INTO public.bathroom_reports (bathroom_id, reported_by, report_type, notes)
  VALUES (p_bathroom_id, v_user_id, p_report_type, p_notes)
  RETURNING id INTO v_report_id;

  RETURN jsonb_build_object(
    'report_id',  v_report_id,
    'created_at', NOW()
  );
END;
$$;

GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION public.add_bathroom(TEXT,TEXT,TEXT,TEXT,TEXT,TEXT,DOUBLE PRECISION,DOUBLE PRECISION,BOOLEAN,BOOLEAN,BOOLEAN,TEXT) TO authenticated;
GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION public.submit_access_code(UUID, TEXT) TO authenticated;
GRANT EXECUTE ON FUNCTION public.create_report(UUID, TEXT, TEXT) TO authenticated;
```

### Phase 15.2: Contribution Validators

**File: `src/validators/contribution.ts`**

```typescript
import { z } from 'zod';

/**
 * Contribution Validators
 *
 * PLACE NAME:
 * 2–100 chars after trim. Mirrors DB constraint + business sense.
 * We do not uppercase or normalize — user's casing is preserved.
 *
 * CODE VALUE:
 * 1–20 chars, alphanumeric + common special chars (#, *, -, space).
 * Common codes: "1234", "B2C#", "1-2-3-4", "STAR". Max 20 covers edge cases.
 * Whitespace is trimmed server-side; Zod trims client-side for preview accuracy.
 *
 * COORDINATES:
 * Standard WGS84 bounds. Zod does NOT allow null — if coordinates are absent,
 * the form is not submittable (enforced by the component's submit-disabled logic).
 */

export const addBathroomSchema = z.object({
  place_name:       z.string().min(2, 'Name must be at least 2 characters')
                              .max(100, 'Name cannot exceed 100 characters')
                              .transform((s) => s.trim()),
  address_line1:    z.string().max(200).optional(),
  city:             z.string().max(100).optional(),
  state:            z.string().max(50).optional(),
  postal_code:      z.string().max(20).optional(),
  latitude:         z.number().min(-90).max(90),
  longitude:        z.number().min(-180).max(180),
  is_locked:        z.boolean().nullable().default(null),
  is_accessible:    z.boolean().nullable().default(null),
  is_customer_only: z.boolean().default(false),
  initial_code:     z.string().min(1).max(20)
                              .transform((s) => s.trim())
                              .optional(),
});

export const submitCodeSchema = z.object({
  bathroom_id: z.string().uuid(),
  code_value:  z.string()
    .min(1,  'Code cannot be empty')
    .max(20, 'Code cannot exceed 20 characters')
    .regex(
      /^[a-zA-Z0-9#*\-\s]+$/,
      'Code can only contain letters, numbers, #, *, -, and spaces'
    )
    .transform((s) => s.trim()),
});

export const createReportSchema = z.object({
  bathroom_id: z.string().uuid(),
  report_type: z.enum([
    'wrong_code', 'closed', 'unsafe', 'duplicate',
    'incorrect_hours', 'no_restroom', 'other',
  ]),
  notes: z.string().max(500).optional(),
});

export type ValidatedAddBathroom = z.infer<typeof addBathroomSchema>;
export type ValidatedSubmitCode  = z.infer<typeof submitCodeSchema>;
export type ValidatedCreateReport = z.infer<typeof createReportSchema>;

export function validateAddBathroom(data: unknown): ValidatedAddBathroom {
  return addBathroomSchema.parse(data);
}
export function validateSubmitCode(data: unknown): ValidatedSubmitCode {
  return submitCodeSchema.parse(data);
}
export function validateCreateReport(data: unknown): ValidatedCreateReport {
  return createReportSchema.parse(data);
}
```

---

### Phase 15.3: Contribution Service

**File: `src/services/ContributionService.ts`**

```typescript
import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase';
import {
  validateAddBathroom,
  validateSubmitCode,
  validateCreateReport,
} from '@/validators/contribution';
import type { ValidatedAddBathroom } from '@/validators/contribution';
import type { ReportType } from '@/types/index';

/**
 * ContributionService
 *
 * ERROR TAXONOMY (consistent with all other services):
 * 'AUTH_REQUIRED'     → not authenticated; trigger sign-in
 * 'VALIDATION_ERROR'  → bad input; surface inline
 * 'RATE_LIMITED'      → cooldown active; show specific message
 * 'DUPLICATE'         → nearby bathroom / existing report; show toast
 * 'NOT_FOUND'         → bathroom was removed mid-flow
 * 'NETWORK_ERROR'     → connectivity; show retry
 */

class ContributionService {
  async addBathroom(input: ValidatedAddBathroom): Promise<{ bathroom_id: string }> {
    const validated = validateAddBathroom(input);

    const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('add_bathroom', {
      p_place_name:       validated.place_name,
      p_address_line1:    validated.address_line1 ?? null,
      p_city:             validated.city          ?? null,
      p_state:            validated.state         ?? null,
      p_postal_code:      validated.postal_code   ?? null,
      p_country_code:     'US',
      p_latitude:         validated.latitude,
      p_longitude:        validated.longitude,
      p_is_locked:        validated.is_locked     ?? null,
      p_is_accessible:    validated.is_accessible ?? null,
      p_is_customer_only: validated.is_customer_only,
      p_initial_code:     validated.initial_code  ?? null,
    });

    if (error) {
      this.throwTypedError(error.message);
    }

    return data as { bathroom_id: string };
  }

  async submitCode(bathroomId: string, codeValue: string): Promise<{ code_id: string }> {
    const validated = validateSubmitCode({ bathroom_id: bathroomId, code_value: codeValue });

    const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('submit_access_code', {
      p_bathroom_id: validated.bathroom_id,
      p_code_value:  validated.code_value,
    });

    if (error) {
      this.throwTypedError(error.message);
    }

    return data as { code_id: string };
  }

  async createReport(
    bathroomId: string,
    reportType: ReportType,
    notes?: string
  ): Promise<{ report_id: string }> {
    const validated = validateCreateReport({
      bathroom_id: bathroomId,
      report_type: reportType,
      notes,
    });

    const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('create_report', {
      p_bathroom_id: validated.bathroom_id,
      p_report_type: validated.report_type,
      p_notes:       validated.notes ?? null,
    });

    if (error) {
      this.throwTypedError(error.message);
    }

    return data as { report_id: string };
  }

  private throwTypedError(message: string): never {
    if (message.includes('AUTH_REQUIRED'))    throw new Error('AUTH_REQUIRED: ' + message);
    if (message.includes('VALIDATION_ERROR')) throw new Error('VALIDATION_ERROR: ' + message);
    if (message.includes('RATE_LIMITED'))     throw new Error('RATE_LIMITED: ' + message);
    if (message.includes('DUPLICATE'))        throw new Error('DUPLICATE: ' + message);
    if (message.includes('NOT_FOUND'))        throw new Error('NOT_FOUND: ' + message);
    throw new Error('NETWORK_ERROR: ' + message);
  }
}

export const contributionService = new ContributionService();
```
